public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as street physician.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a street physician still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of street physician in and around Ithtananalor, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of street physician while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Ithtananalor, that usually means carrying illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement without letting the role of street physician visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Veyra Boltmere needs help with a problem in Ithtananalor that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Veyra Boltmere can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Veyra Boltmere carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Ithtananalor, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Lord Aric Roaz, Office of Roazian Enforcement.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ithtananalor: the part of Ithtananalor where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
